steps.title: Substitute x equals 2 into the function
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = 25x + 30$ and need to find $f(2)$. Replace every instance of $x$ with \$2$:

$$f(2) = 25(2) + 30$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Multiply: $25 \times 2 = 50$

$$f(2) = 50 + 30 = 80$$

This matches choice C — C is correct.
